title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement link
scenario: Onboarding EULA page License Agreement link directs user to the latest license agreement page (https://www.hp.com/go/sweula)
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the onboarding screen, locate the EULA (End User License Agreement) page.
3. Tap the 'License Agreement' link displayed on the EULA page.
4. Observe the browser or in-app web view that opens.
expected: The user is directed to the latest license agreement page at https://www.hp.com/go/sweula.
